name: Mint Chip Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together sugar, flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another bowl, combine the melted margarine, eggs, and vanilla.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Fold in the mint chocolate chips and chopped walnuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch x 13-inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Do not overbake.
